overview.description: The Calamos Autocallable Income ETF (CAIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed, using total return swaps based on a US Large-Cap laddered portfolio of autocallable yield notes. The fund aims to provide a high monthly income, but not guaranteed, along with some downside cushion. CAIE was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Calamos.
